seo.title: Lawyer in Gulberg, Lahore | Corporate, Tax & Property — Saeed Law Firm
seo.description: Lawyer serving Gulberg I–V, MM Alam Road, and Liberty Market. Corporate, tax, and commercial property matters for Gulberg-based businesses.

hero.intro: Lawyer serving Gulberg I–V, MM Alam Road, and Liberty Market. Corporate, tax, and commercial property matters for Gulberg-based businesses.

bodyMarkdown:
Gulberg is the commercial spine of central Lahore. MM Alam Road, Liberty Market, Mini Market, and the corporate corridor along Main Boulevard concentrate retail, F&B, professional services, and corporate-office activity in five contiguous blocks. The legal-case profile of a **lawyer in Gulberg Lahore** is therefore weighted toward business — commercial leases, SECP compliance, employment matters, tax notices on retail businesses, trademark and franchise disputes — combined with the family and high-net-worth estate work that follows from Gulberg's affluent residential base. **Saeed Law Firm** has served Gulberg clients since the area's commercial development took off in the 1970s. Our office at 13 Fane Road is a 15-minute drive from MM Alam Road.

### Gulberg-Specific Matters We Handle

**Commercial leases.** MM Alam Road, Liberty Market, and Mini Market lease disputes — tenant-landlord matters under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009, security deposit recovery, eviction defence, and lease renewal disputes are among the most common Gulberg engagements.

**Corporate and SECP work.** A high concentration of Gulberg-based companies use our [corporate lawyer in Lahore](/corporate-lawyer-in-lahore) services for incorporation, annual SECP filings, contract drafting, shareholder agreements, and commercial litigation.

**Tax notices.** Retail and F&B businesses on MM Alam and Liberty regularly receive FBR section 122, 161, and 177 notices, plus Punjab sales tax notices on services. See our [tax lawyer in Lahore](/tax-lawyer-in-lahore) page for the practice-area dimension.

**Trademark and franchise disputes.** Gulberg's retail concentration produces trademark conflicts, franchise terminations, and distribution-agreement disputes more often than other parts of Lahore. We handle these at Civil Courts Lahore and the LHC where IP jurisdiction applies.

**Employment and labour matters.** Restaurant and retail employee disputes — termination, gratuity, EOBI, social security — feature regularly in Gulberg matters.

**Family and estate work.** Gulberg's residential base in Gulberg I, II, IV, and V brings family-law and inheritance work, often involving high-value properties.

### Gulberg Areas We Serve

- Gulberg I, II, III, IV, and V
- MM Alam Road
- Liberty Market and Mini Market
- Main Boulevard Gulberg corporate corridor
- Garden Town (south of Gulberg)
- Faisal Town (south-west; see our [Faisal Town page](/areas/lawyer-in-faisal-town-lahore))
- Muslim Town
- Shadman
- Jail Road healthcare and commercial corridor

### Where Gulberg Disputes Are Heard

- **Civil Courts Lahore** at Aiwan-e-Adal — civil suits, recovery, specific performance, eviction
- **Lahore High Court** — writs, second appeals, Companies Bench matters ([court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court))
- **ATIR Lahore** — tax tribunal appeals ([court page →](/courts/tax-tribunal-lawyer-lahore))
- **Banking Courts Lahore** — Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance 2001 matters
- **Family Courts** at Aiwan-e-Adal — family matters

### Travel and Consultation

Office to MM Alam Road: ~15 minutes by car via Mall Road and Lytton Road. We offer Zoom and WhatsApp consultations for clients who prefer remote first meetings. Site visits to Gulberg commercial properties for lease and dispute matters arranged by appointment.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Gulberg Lahore

- Multi-practice firm covering corporate, tax, civil, and family work — Gulberg matters often touch multiple practice areas
- 50+ years of Lahore practice with a stable client base across Gulberg's commercial and residential blocks
- Office in central Lahore allowing same-morning court attendance at LHC and Aiwan-e-Adal
- Coordinated tax-and-corporate strategy for SECP-compliant Gulberg businesses

### Frequently Asked Questions

**I run a Gulberg-based F&B business and have received an FBR notice. What do I do?**
Engage a tax lawyer immediately. Each FBR notice has a deadline, and a structured reply at notice stage prevents escalation to amended assessment and recovery action.

**Can I evict a non-paying tenant from Liberty Market?**
Yes. Eviction is initiated under the Punjab Rented Premises Act 2009 at the Civil Court Lahore. Grounds include non-payment of rent, breach of conditions, and personal need.

**My company is registered with SECP and based in Gulberg. Do I need an annual retainer?**
For active companies, annual retainers covering Form A, Form 29, and routine SECP compliance reduce the risk of penalty exposure substantially. We offer fixed-fee SECP retainers.

**What courts handle commercial disputes in Lahore?**
Civil Courts Lahore for general commercial disputes; LHC Companies Bench for corporate disputes including oppression and mismanagement; Banking Courts for financial institution matters; ATIR for tax appeals.

**How much does a lawyer in Gulberg Lahore charge?**
Standard firm rates apply — initial consultation PKR 5,000–10,000, fixed-fee for routine matters, stage-based for litigation, and retainers for ongoing corporate work.

details.label: Common Case Types
values: Commercial lease & tenancy at MM Alam / Liberty
Tax notices for retail & F&B businesses

details.label: Travel From Our Office
values: ~15 minutes by car from Fane Road

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.

relatedPages.title: Tax Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Tax lawyer in Lahore. We handle income tax notices, FBR audits, Commissioner Appeals, and Tax Tribunal cases. 50+ years' practice in Lahore.

relatedPages.title: Property Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Property lawyer in Lahore handling land disputes, mutation (intiqal), inheritance partition, DHA/LDA matters, and rental disputes. 50+ years' experience.
